column2:
Guide:
1. Input your current auction houses to all fields containing a star (*). 
Make sure you have the proper setup that you can find BELOW.
2. This sheet is based on you also thaumaturging the Leather that you get. 
So make sure to do that aswell to get the proper numbers. 
3. You also need to do thaumaturgy on all of the transmutagens that you get.
